summary_text: Yes. The repo has explicit x-auto guardrails and formatting expectations for source-grounded drafting. - [docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md):14 SSOT for drafting/sync invariants. Key rules: lead-post vs quote-post URL handling, `Source URLs` as evidence field, default `draft` mode, proper-noun leakage checks for source-derived branded terms, `800-1000字` target for schedulable drafts, and concrete line-break cadence rules for long-form posts. - [skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md):32 Operational guard layer. Adds mandatory preflight for publish/schedule, explicit quote-post body URL prohibition, source/Notion sync requirements, length + rhythm checks for new drafts, and English-for-auto-translation writing constraints. - [docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md):9 Specialized formatting rule for lead posts of `note.com`: note URL must be in body (and `Body JA` for bilingual), while quote/reply flows remain governed by the main x-auto contract. - [tests/test-x-auto-skill-contract.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-x-auto-skill-contract.sh):17 Regression checks enforce presence of the above guardrails (draft-default, metadata-drift triage, long-form rhythm, runtime verification expectations, and note-link boundary). - [docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_notion_manifest.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_notion_manifest.md):5 [docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_queue_candidates.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_queue_candidates.json):4 [docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_draft_manifest.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/drafts/20260402_x-auto_draft_manifest.json):2 These are concrete source-grounded drafting artifacts/templates (not SSOT policy): they define expected row schema (`x-auto-draft-candidate.v1`), mapping from source sections to body fields, and source evidence linkage (`source_url`, `source_urls`, `source_assertions`).
